Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}But man, what Aragaki-san told us was shocking, huh.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1072 0 0}I'll let Kirijo-senpai know what we found out about Yamagishi-san.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}The fact that she's missing is no small matter.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2111 0 0}Man, we're totally gonna get yelled at for doing that without permission... I can already see it happening...[n]{f 1 1}
